calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; Sanctions Req.
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Assignee Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
